feat.name: Dazzling Dragonet Disappearance
feat.text: A brilliant sheen on your scales flashes when you’re hit, then you’re nowhere to be found. The triggering enemy becomes dazzled for 1 round, and you become affected by a 4th-rank *invisibility* spell.

traits.name: Dragonet
traits.text: Dragonets are miniature dragons, complete with wings, dagger-like teeth, and magical breath. They can be fiercely independent and proud, at times protective or avaricious, and they delight in the finer things in life.

feat.trigger: An adjacent enemy hits you with an attack.
